products.name: Discovery
description: Our flagship two tonearm platform featuring a radically new exo-skeleton chassis system designed to minimize resonances and optimize isolation.
Kronos developed a wholly new way to attach the chassis to the suspension system, using completely different soft clamping methods.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Discovery represents Kronos Audio's most ambitious expression of counter-rotational analogue playback. Its exo-skeleton chassis and isolated suspension architecture are tuned to lower stored energy, improve timing precision, and preserve low-level musical detail.

Designed as a reference platform for discerning listeners, Discovery supports a dual-tonearm layout and a highly resolved mechanical grounding strategy. Every interface is intended to keep resonant behavior predictable while maintaining the sense of ease and scale associated with the brand's flagship systems.
notes: Reference-level chassis architecture with dual-tonearm capability.
Optimized for isolation, stability, and long-term upgradeability.

products.name: Perpetual
description: Our one tonearm turntable, utilizing advanced resonance control at a more affordable price point.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Perpetual extends the Kronos design language into a more accessible single-tonearm configuration, focusing on resonance control, drive stability, and a direct mechanical path between groove and listener.

products.name: Kronos Pro
description: The original Kronos reference turntable. The PRO set a new standard in analogue reproduction by combining counter-rotation and overhead suspension.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kronos Pro is the foundational reference deck that introduced many listeners to the brand's counter-rotational architecture and suspended dual-platter philosophy. It remains a defining statement of Kronos Audio's approach to timing, stillness, and mechanical balance.

Its role in the product family is both historical and practical: a mature reference platform whose engineering continues to inform later Kronos models. This overview consolidates the section structure so the page now matches Sparta's presentation.
notes: Original reference platform from the Kronos catalogue.
Structured to support consistent editorial storytelling across products.

products.name: Sparta
products.tagline: The Soul of a New Machine
description: Our no-frills platform - an entry to the world of KRONOS.
Unique to behold, the Sparta is essentially two complete turntables-each including a skeletal, metal-framed plinth fabricated of solid aluminum boards.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Sparta turntable is the embodiment of Kronos Audio's core design principles, distilled into their purest form. Built to disappear into silence-so the recording remains. Every surface, every interface, every tolerance exists for one purpose: to preserve time.

At the heart of the Sparta are two counter-rotating platters, each driven by its own motor and suspended from above by a network of elastomers that isolate the mechanism from external vibrations. The result is a level of speed stability and resonance control that belies the Sparta's modest price point.
notes: Built to disappear into silence-so the recording remains.
Every surface, every interface, every tolerance exists for one purpose: to preserve time.

endorsements.quote: I've never before been treated to vinyl playback from any system I've owned that is as clearly and profoundly moving as what I am now hearing...
I've never before been treated to vinyl playback from any system I've owned that is as clearly and profoundly moving as what I am now hearing...
A cloudless day has dawned over the vinyl landscape, one where you feel you can see forever and your view is only limited by your acuity. There are no environmental impediments in the way.
The Kronos Sparta turntable takes the counter rotational technology of the flagship Kronos turntable and incorporates it into a more affordable and tidy package.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The Kronos tonearm program extends the brand's approach to resonance control beyond the deck itself, using RS technology to manage energy evacuation, tracking stability, and musical flow.

products.name: Phono Preamplifiers
description: Reference phono stages designed to preserve the integrity of the analog signal.
Engineered for low noise, accurate gain, and tonal neutrality.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Kronos phono preamplifiers are positioned as supporting electronics for listeners who want the same restraint, resolution, and tonal honesty found in the turntable line.

products.name: Full Analogue Solution
description: Engineered foundations that control vibration and preserve mechanical integrity, allowing Kronos systems to perform at their highest level.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: The racks and support solutions complete the Kronos playback environment by addressing the physical foundation beneath the system. Their role is to reduce environmental interference and give the analogue chain a more stable platform from floor to chassis.
